We built our reputation the same way you build yours—by serving customers well. Through innovative coatings engineered to meet, or exceed, specifications and value-added services designed to deliver safety, efficiency, and consistency in your coatings operation.

Color to Go® Wet Paint Samples

New Partnership with the Mercedes-EQ Formula E Team
 Sherwin-Williams® Automotive Finishes and the Mercedes-EQ Formula E Team are pleased to announce a new partnership fostering continued innovation in the automotive space.
Sustainability
Sherwin-Williams 2021 Sustainability Report
 The Sherwin-Williams 2021 Sustainability Report is now available. Through this year's theme “Building on the Good”, we reflect on the progress we have made in pursuit of our goals and outline the steps we are taking to chart a path for a brighter, more sustainable future.
